mainHtml:
Home page/Industries/Medical Devices

Medical device parts manufacturing support

Provide material suggestions, precision machining, Surface Finishing and testing data cooperation for R&D verification, tooling fixtures, equipment components and non-implanted structural parts.

Stainless SteelEngineering Plasticslow-volume verificationsize report

Applicable scenarios

The content on this page focuses on the description of manufacturing capabilities and does not replace the judgment of medical registration, clinical verification or product compliance certification.

R&D prototypes

Used for structural verification, assembly verification and ergonomic testing, supporting rapid iteration in low-volumees.

Equipment parts

Suitable for precision structural parts in diagnostic equipment, experimental instruments and automated test equipment.

Fixtures & Tooling

Supports customized processing of positioning fixtures, test fixtures, cleaning tooling and assembly auxiliary parts.

MaterialsStainless steel, aluminum alloy, POM, PEEK, etc. are evaluated according to use.
AccuracyDevelop processing and review plans for key dimensions according to drawing requirements.
surfacePassivation, anodizing, sandblasting and polishing options can be evaluated.
informationDimensions and process records are available upon project request.

Project advancement path

01
Requirements confirmationConfirm part usage, exposure environment, material limitations, critical dimensions and cleaning requirements.
02
DFM assessmentEvaluate the impact of thin walls, hole placement, chamfers, clamping, and finishing processes on manufacturing stability.
03
Sample processinglow-volume verification is performed first, and then the structure or process parameters are optimized based on assembly feedback.
04
Test deliveryOrganize inspection records, packaging and traceability information according to drawings and project requirements.

Review Checklist

Does not claim medical certificationNo promise of clinical useDistinguish between prototypes and mass productionInformation requirements require project confirmation

Let engineering teams first assess medical device part manufacturing paths

Upload models, drawings and usage instructions to get materials, process and testing recommendations faster.
